options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -abut_boundary_tap_distance
options.description: Specifies boundary cells and their tap distance when they are vertically abutted

options.name: -antenna_tap_break_cell
options.description: Specifies cells can break antenna tap

options.name: -antenna_tap_cell
options.description: Specifies normal antenna tap cell

options.name: -antenna_tap_left_cell
options.description: Specifies antenna tap cell for left edge

options.name: -antenna_tap_pitch
options.description: Specifies the pitch of antenna tap cell

options.name: -antenna_tap_right_cell
options.description: Specifies antenna tap cell for right edge

options.name: -antenna_tap_right_top_edge_cell
options.description: Specifies antenna tap cell for right top edge

options.name: -avoid_vertical_well_abutment
options.description: Specifies which type of well-tap cells to be forbidden from vertical abutment

options.name: -avoidAbutment
options.description: Specifies whether the inserted taps should avoid horizontal and vertical abutment

options.name: -block_boundary_only
options.description: Specifies whether inserting termination cells on the core boundary

options.name: -bottom_tap_cell
options.description: Cell to be used as bottom tap for addEndCap boundary cell insertion flow

options.name: -bottom_termination_cell
options.description: Specifies the list of bottom termination cells to be used

options.name: -cell
options.description: Cell to be used as welltap

options.name: -channel_offset
options.description: Specifies the offset value between taps and blockage in channel

options.name: -check_channel
options.description: Specifies whether checking blockage channel

options.name: -column_cell
options.description: Specifies the list of cells which can be replaced by termination cell

options.name: -create_rows
options.description: Create rows for welltap cell techSites which do not have rows in the floor plan

options.name: -disable_check_zone_at_boundary
options.description: disable check zone at bounadry

options.name: -inRowOffset
options.description: Specifies the distance between the first wellTap in a row and the start of the row

options.name: -insert_cells
options.description: Insert well-taps based on cell, layer and inertval

options.name: -rule
options.description: Specifies the well latch-up rule

options.name: -siteOffset
options.description: Specifies the offset value in number of sites that vertical taps need to be aware of

options.name: -tap_function_cells
options.description: Specifies the list of tap function cells to be used

options.name: -tap_termination_alignment
options.description: Specifies whether to align well-taps and termination cells

options.name: -termination_align
options.description: Specifies the termination cell align

options.name: -termination_cell
options.description: Specifies the list of termination cells to be used

options.name: -top_tap_cell
options.description: Cell to be used as top tap for addEndCap boundary cell insertion flow

options.name: -top_termination_cell
options.description: Specifies the list of top termination cells to be used

options.name: -vertical_boundary_spacing
options.description: Specifies the spacing between center of tap cell and vertical boundary

options.name: -well_cut_cell
options.description: Specifies the list of cells with the well cuts

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
